description: Default tool + skill descriptions for the OpenClaw resolver classifier. Override via plugin config (catalogOverridesFile). See README 'Description Overrides' for details.

tools.web_search: Web search via Brave API — find current information, research topics, lookup articles, news, competitors, benchmarks
tools.web_fetch: Fetch/extract content from URLs — pull docs, articles, pricing pages, status pages, postmortems, SEC filings, any page whose URL is known or implied
tools.x_search: Search X/Twitter posts, trends, reactions, sentiment
tools.browser: Browser automation: navigate, click, login, fill forms, screenshot — use when you need to interact with a live webpage, NOT for reading uploaded screenshots (use image)
tools.canvas: Present data visualizations and interactive canvases
tools.nodes: Control paired IoT/smart-home devices and physical hardware: speakers, lights, blinds, routers, cameras, phones, displays, notifications, screen recording, location. Use for any "turn on/off", "mute", "reboot", "play", "dim", "open/close", "adjust" on physical devices
tools.cron: Schedule cron jobs, reminders, recurring tasks, wake events — use for ANY recurring/repeating/"every day/week/hour" or "remind me in/at" request, and for booking buffers/slots on a repeating schedule
tools.message: Send messages, texts, emails, notifications, polls, reactions to Telegram/Slack/Discord/SMS. Use for ANY "tell X", "text X", "notify X", "let X know", "send X a note", "draft a message to X", "apology to X", "thank-you to X", "confirm with X" — anywhere a human recipient needs to be informed
tools.gateway: OpenClaw gateway: restart, update config, change models, apply settings. Also for cross-channel delivery (e.g., send to both Slack AND email)
tools.agents_list: List available agent IDs for spawning
tools.sessions_list: List active sessions and sub-agents, check agent status
tools.sessions_history: Fetch message history from another session — use for "what did I say about X yesterday", "pull up the earlier thread"
tools.sessions_send: Send a message into another session/sub-agent
tools.sessions_spawn: Spawn coding agents (Codex, Claude Code, Pi), sub-agents, parallel research agents, or ACP sessions. Use for "spin up X", "launch parallel agents", "kick off agents to", "delegate to"
tools.sessions_yield: End current turn to receive sub-agent results — use after sessions_spawn when awaiting parallel output
tools.subagents: Coordinate running sub-agents: list, steer, kill. Pair with sessions_spawn when you need to monitor/manage/cancel spawned agents
tools.session_status: Session status: model, usage, cost, configuration
tools.image: Analyze/describe images with vision model — use for screenshots, photos, diagrams ALREADY uploaded (not live webpages)
tools.image_generate: Generate new images from text prompts
tools.video_generate: Generate videos from prompts or reference images
tools.tts: Text-to-speech: convert text to spoken audio/voice briefings, voiceovers, narration
tools.code_execution: Run sandboxed Python for calculations, data analysis, tabulation, forecasting, dedup, anomaly detection, categorization, CSV/JSON analysis, pattern matching — use whenever the task implies comparing, aggregating, filtering, or programmatically analyzing data (even financial)
tools.memory_search: Fuzzy/semantic search across memories — default for "find memories about X", "what do I remember about Y"
tools.memory_add: Store a NEW memory — use for "remember that X", "save this as a memory", "note that Y" (first-time storage)
tools.memory_get: Retrieve a SPECIFIC memory by ID or verify it was stored — use for "check if my preference about X was saved", "pull up memory ID N"
tools.memory_list: List all memories (browse/inventory) — use for "show me what you remember", "list my stored preferences", "what memories exist about X"
tools.memory_update: Modify an EXISTING stored memory (not create new) — use for "update my preference from X to Y", "change my stored X", "revise the note about Y". Distinguish from memory_add (new) by the presence of an update/change verb
tools.finance__get_accounts: Get linked financial accounts, balances, institutions — use for "cash position", "account balances", "which accounts", overdrafts, negative balances
tools.finance__get_budgets: Get budgets and category limits — use for "am I over budget", "budget status", "category limits"
tools.finance__get_cashflow: Cashflow analysis (income vs expenses over time) — use for "cash position" trend, cashflow forecast, burn rate, net income over a period
tools.finance__get_transaction_categories: List transaction categories — REQUIRED when filtering/grouping transactions by category, or when checking which categories exist
tools.finance__get_transactions: Fetch transactions with optional filters (account/category/date/amount) — use for "show transactions", "find duplicates", "transactions over $X", "uncategorized transactions"
tools.finance__refresh_accounts: Refresh/sync account data from institutions — use for "refresh my accounts", "update balances", "pull latest data"

skills.coding-agent: Delegate coding tasks to external coding agents (Codex, Claude Code, etc.)
skills.gh-issues: Fetch GitHub issues, spawn agents to fix and open PRs
skills.github: GitHub operations: issues, PRs, CI, code review via gh CLI
skills.healthcheck: Host security hardening, firewall/SSH audit, deployment checks
skills.himalaya: CLI email: list, read, write, reply, search via IMAP/SMTP
skills.openai-whisper-api: Transcribe audio via OpenAI Whisper API
skills.skill-creator: Create, edit, improve, or audit skills and SKILL.md files
skills.slack: Slack operations: reactions, pins, channel actions
skills.tmux: Remote-control tmux sessions: send keystrokes, scrape pane output
skills.video-frames: Extract frames or clips from videos using ffmpeg
skills.weather: Current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo
skills.research-qa: Pre-delivery QA checklist for research output
skills.gmail-oauth: Gmail OAuth2 token lifecycle: refresh, validate, escalate
